title: nonatelia sikkimensis
intro: Nonatelia sikkimensis, a plant species commonly found in the Eastern Himalayas, is a type of shrub that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Nonatelia sikkimensis is often used to prepare herbal remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments.
